---
title: "Function Testing"
output: html_document
---

# Kalman Filter
```{r}
rm(list=ls())
gc()
source("ArtfimaCausal.R")
source("MultiStateSpaceFunctions.R")
source("Data_Creation_Funcs.R")
source("MCFuncs.R")
library(bench)
true_theta <- list(
  d = 0,
  lambda = 0,
  phi = 0.45,
  theta = 0.3,
  sigma2_eta = 0.5,
  sigma2_w = 0,
  rho = 0.35
)

hat_theta <- list(
  d = 0,
  lambda = 0,
  phi = 0.5,
  theta = 0.5,
  sigma2_eta = 0.75,
  rho = 0.5
)

T_len = 250
m = 10
n_side = 10
n_loc = n_side^2
data <- simulate_artfima_spatial(
  T_len = T_len,
  n_side = n_side,
  m = m,
  true_theta = true_theta
)

coords <- expand.grid(x = 1:n_side, y = 1:n_side)
coords <- as.matrix(coords)

D <- as.matrix(dist(coords))
Sigma_eta <- hat_theta$sigma2_eta * exp(-D / hat_theta$rho)

psi <- psi_artfima(
  m = m,
  d = hat_theta$d,
  lambda = hat_theta$lambda,
  ar = hat_theta$phi,
  ma = hat_theta$theta
)

state_space <- list(
  R = diag(true_theta$sigma2_w, n_loc),
  psi = psi,
  Sigma_eta = Sigma_eta
)
  
# inputs are data, state_space, m


mark(
  kalman_filter(data, state_space, m),
  iterations = 5
)
```

# Neg_loglik
```{r}
rm(list=ls())
gc()
source("ArtfimaCausal.R")
source("MultiStateSpaceFunctions.R")
source("Data_Creation_Funcs.R")
source("MCFuncs.R")
library(bench)
true_theta <- list(
  d = 0,
  lambda = 0,
  phi = 0.45,
  theta = 0.3,
  sigma2_eta = 0.5,
  sigma2_w = 0,
  rho = 0.35
)

hat_theta <- list(
  phi = 0.5,
  theta = 0.5,
  sigma2_eta = 0.75,
  rho = 0.5
)

T_len = 250
m = 10
n_side = 10
n_loc = n_side^2
data <- simulate_artfima_spatial(
  T_len = T_len,
  n_side = n_side,
  m = m,
  true_theta = true_theta
)

coords <- expand.grid(x = 1:n_side, y = 1:n_side)
coords <- as.matrix(coords)

D <- as.matrix(dist(coords))

# par is the parameters

# par, data, m, n_side, D

mark(
  neg_loglik(hat_theta, data, m, n_side, D),
  iterations = 5
)
```


# MC One Run
```{r}
rm(list=ls())
gc()
source("ArtfimaCausal.R")
source("MultiStateSpaceFunctions.R")
source("Data_Creation_Funcs.R")
source("MCFuncs.R")
library(bench)
true_theta <- list(
  d = 0,
  lambda = 0,
  phi = 0.45,
  theta = 0.3,
  sigma2_eta = 0.5,
  sigma2_w = 0,
  rho = 0.35
)

hat_theta <- list(
  phi = 0.5,
  theta = 0.5,
  sigma2_eta = 0.75,
  rho = 0.5
)

T_len = 250
m = 5
n_side = 10
n_loc = n_side^2

bounds = get_bounds(hat_theta)
lower = bounds$lower
upper = bounds$upper
# i, true_theta, start_vals, T_len, n_side, m, lower, upper

mark(
  mc_one_run(1, true_theta, hat_theta, T_len, n_side, m, lower, upper),
  iterations = 5
)
```
